---
output: 
  pdf_document: 
    keep_tex: yes
---

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())
library(dplyr)

df <- read.csv("base_stagger_did.csv")

head(df)

```


```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(DIDmultiplegt)

```


```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

did = did_multiplegt(
  df = df,
  Y = "y",
  G = "G",
  T = "ano",
  D = "d_x_t",
  controls = c("renda", "escolaridade", "populacao"),
  average_effect = T
)

did


```

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

did = did_multiplegt(
  df = df,
  Y = "y",
  G = "G",
  T = "ano",
  D = "d_x_t",
  controls = c("renda", "escolaridade", "populacao"),
  placebo = 6,
  dynamic = 8,
  brep = 2
)

did


```
